summary: Implemented and improved several src/melee/if/ifstatus damage/status HUD routines. The PR replaced multiple NOT_IMPLEMENTED stubs or placeholders, updated real function prototypes, and corrected IfDamageState damage fields to signed s16 for -1 sentinels. decomp.dev reported GALE01 matched code +0.04% / +1664 bytes with four new ifstatus matches; there was no PR body or human review text in the slice, so intent is inferred from the diff and automated match report.

key_files.role: Main implementation work: digit shake, damage/HP update proc, HUD number setup, player mark setup, player HUD initialization, archive section loading, and ifStatus_802F6EA4 status element setup.
Changed prototypes from void-only stubs to real signatures for ifStatus_802F5B48(HSD_GObj*), ifStatus_802F5EC0(IfDamageState*, s32), and ifStatus_802F61FC(IfDamageState*, s32).
Changed IfDamageState.damage_percent and old_damage from u16 to s16, matching code that stores -1 and clamps against negative values.

what_changed: Added include dependencies for implemented code paths, including if/ifcoget.h, lb/lb_00F9.h, lb/lbaudio_ax.h, baselib/gobjgxlink.h, baselib/gobjobject.h, and baselib/gobjproc.h.

Implemented ifStatus_802F4B84 as damage digit shake logic using frames_of_shake_remaining, cached translation_x/translation_y, HSD_Randf()-0.5f offsets, damage_from_last_attack scaling, and clamps around 0.1014f and 1.5207f.

Refactored ifStatus_802F4EDC matching shape: finds the IfDamageState by scanning six HUD players for HUD_parent_entity, directly walks hud->janim_selection_joints child chains to feed HSD_TObjAddAnimAll, updates ones/tens/hundreds digit texture frames, hides leading tens/hundreds via flag 0x10, and changes interpolated GXColor component casts from u8 to s8.

Added static inline find_player_by_entity and implemented ifStatus_802F5B48 as the per-HUD update proc for damage_percent/old_damage, stamina HP via Player_GetRemainingHP, normal damage via Player_GetDamage, force_digit_shake, unk10, damage_from_last_attack, and an unk9 timeout path to ifStatus_802F6788.

Implemented ifStatus_802F5EC0 to create or reuse the damage-number GObj, load hud->unk258 joints, set GX link/procs, load DmgNum animations, position the HUD with ifAll_802F3424, cache four digit JObjs and their base translations, initialize the percent sign TObj, and call the update/render routines.

Implemented ifStatus_802F61FC to create or reuse the player mark GObj, load hud->unk268, animate the mark texture from Player_GetPlayerCharacter/gm_80168B34, handle special character remapping to CKIND_BOY for listed cases, position the mark, and apply team/player HUD color to material diffuse RGB.

Implemented ifStatus_802F6508 to initialize one player's IfDamageState, reset damage and flags, call ifStatus_802F61FC and ifStatus_802F5EC0, optionally call un_802FF364, and select stock HUD mode with ifStock_802F98E8 based on StartMeleeRules.

Implemented ifStatus_802F66A4 to load DmgNum_scene_models and DmgMrk_scene_models through lbArchive_LoadSections and populate HudIndex resource pointers such as unk258, jobj_desc_parent, janim_selection_joints, janim_selection_textures, unk268, unk26C, unk270, and unk274.

Implemented ifStatus_802F6EA4, replacing the placeholder comment with status element GObj/JObj setup, callback storage, optional old-GObj removal, lb_80011C18/lb_8000C0E8 animation setup, and a sentinel arg0 == 8 path that invokes callbacks with -1 and plays audio through lbAudioAx_800237A8.
smart_moves: The s16 change for damage_percent and old_damage is a high-leverage type fix: the new code explicitly uses -1 as an uninitialized sentinel and compares values against 0 after Player_GetDamage/Player_GetRemainingHP.
The PR updated public prototypes at the same time as wiring functions into HSD_GObj_SetupProc, preventing ABI/signature drift between ifstatus.c and ifstatus.h.
Caching each digit JObj's base translation during ifStatus_802F5EC0 made ifStatus_802F4B84 able to restore exact positions after shake frames finish.
Using direct HSD child/member chains for TObj texture animation avoided extra local MatAnimJoint/DObj temporaries and produced better matching in ifStatus_802F4EDC.

The implementation preserved exact low-level details useful for matching, including PAD_STACK calls, literal float constants, exact flag bit behavior, GObj link priorities, and even the assert strings in ifStatus_802F61FC.
decomp_lessons: If a HUD value can be initialized to -1, the backing struct field should be signed; using u16 for damage-like fields can block matching and hide sentinel semantics.
For HSD proc callbacks, fix the header signature before installing the function with HSD_GObj_SetupProc; a previous void prototype can be wrong even when the function name/address is known.

HUD archive model fields may need to be treated according to how the original code walks the data, not just by broad semantic guesses. This PR accesses texture animations via hud->janim_selection_joints child chains and fobjdesc casts.
Leading-zero suppression in HUD digits was matched by explicit HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll/HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll on Tens and Hundreds with flag 0x10, not by changing digit values.
Damage and stamina modes invert the meaning of a 'bad change': normal percent increase triggers force_digit_shake, while stamina HP decrease triggers force_digit_shake. Keep both branches separate.

Automated matching can expose cross-unit effects: this ifstatus-only diff improved several mncharsel items but also produced two tiny broken matches, so global data/type edits should be checked beyond the edited source file.
naming_conventions: Address-style function names were retained for unnamed routines: ifStatus_802F4B84, ifStatus_802F5B48, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F61FC, ifStatus_802F6508, ifStatus_802F66A4, and ifStatus_802F6EA4.

Semantic IfDamageState fields were used where evidence was clear: damage_percent, old_damage, damage_from_last_attack, frames_of_shake_remaining, translation_x, translation_y, HUD_parent_entity, and player_slot.
Uncertain fields remained conservative as unk names, including unk9, flags.unk10, HudIndex unk258/unk268/unk26C/unk270/unk274, and local resource names tied to offsets.
HUD digit indexing names Ones, Tens, Hundreds, and Percent make the digit-update code searchable and understandable while preserving the low-level HSD_JObj operations.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used small inline helpers, including offset_rand() and find_player_by_entity(), to shape generated code while keeping logic readable.
Kept PAD_STACK markers in newly implemented routines, including PAD_STACK(8), PAD_STACK(0x18), and PAD_STACK(0x10), where stack layout mattered.

Used exact constants from the original behavior: 0.1014f, 1.5207f, 0.2028f, 2.0F digit texture frame scaling, 0.5f character texture offset, 0.1f TObj rate, 0x3E7 damage cap, 0xC8 unk9 timeout, and JObj flag 0x10.
Changed color interpolation casts from u8 to s8 in ifStatus_802F4EDC, a small signedness detail likely relevant to instruction selection.

Matched HSD object setup order: GObj_Create, HSD_JObjLoadJoint, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLink, optional HSD_GObj_SetupProc, animation load/request, then HSD_JObjAnimAll or TObj animation calls.
A conspicuous cast in ifStatus_802F6508, ifStatus_802F5EC0(hud_player, (u8) ((unsigned long long)arg0)), appears to be expression-shape tuning rather than semantic cleanup.
review_feedback: No human review comments or review records were present in the slice.
Automated decomp.dev report for GALE01 showed matched code 69.23%, +0.04%, +1664 bytes.
decomp.dev reported four new 100% matches: ifStatus_802F4B84 (+851), ifStatus_802F5B48 (+659), ifStatus_802F6EA4 (+400), and ifStatus_802F6508 (+340).
decomp.dev also reported ifstatus improvements that were not full matches: ifStatus_802F61FC to 96.36%, ifStatus_802F5EC0 to 95.20%, ifStatus_802F4EDC to 80.38%, and ifStatus_802F66A4 to 98.25%.
Automated report noted two tiny broken matches: mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter from 100.00% to 99.90% and ifStatus_802F7134 from 100.00% to 99.98%, plus an ifstatus .sdata2 regression of -4 bytes.
follow_up_queries: Investigate remaining unmatched portions of ifStatus_802F61FC, ifStatus_802F5EC0, ifStatus_802F4EDC, and ifStatus_802F66A4 after PR 2537.
Check why PR 2537 caused tiny broken matches in ifStatus_802F7134 and mnCharSel_8026688C_OnEnter.

Audit the ifStatus_802F6EA4 sentinel audio path: the diff checks arg1 >= 0 before both lbAudioAx_800237A8(arg1, ...) and lbAudioAx_800237A8(arg2, ...); verify whether this is required for matching or an unresolved condition name issue.
Rename HudIndex unk258/unk268/unk26C/unk270/unk274 once DmgNum_scene_models and DmgMrk_scene_models resource roles are confirmed.
Revisit the ifStatus_802F66A4 local reset workaround comment after configure/no-warn-error constraints change.
